zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert DeSouthworth於1300年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾素沃斯時，他的父親Gilbert de Southworth30歲，母親Cecily D'Ewyas35歲。他於1339年與Alice d'Ewyas在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1323年被列為high sherrif of lancashire。他去世於1372年在英國藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert DeSouthworth于1300年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾素沃斯时，他的父亲Gilbert de Southworth30岁，母亲Cecily D'Ewyas35岁。他于1339年与Alice d'Ewyas在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1323年被列为high sherrif of lancashire。他去世于1372年在英国藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert DeSouthworth was born in 1300, in Southworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert de Southworth, was 30 and his mother, Cecily D'Ewyas, was 35. He married Alice d'Ewyas in 1339, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. In 1323, at the age of 23, his occupation is listed as high sherrif of lancashire. He died in 1372, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert DeSouthworth est né en 1300, à Southworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert de Southworth, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Cecily D'Ewyas, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Alice d'Ewyas en 1339, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. En 1323, à l’âge de 23 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sherrif of lancashire. Il est décédé en 1372, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert DeSouthworth 1300 in Southworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert de Southworth 30 und seine Mutter Cecily D'Ewyas 35. Er hat 1339 in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Alice d'Ewyas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1323, als er 23 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sherrif of lancashire aufgeführt. Er starb 1372 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert DeSouthworth è nato il nel 1300 nel Southworth, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert de Southworth, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Cecily D'Ewyas, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Alice d'Ewyas nel 1339, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Nel 1323, all'età di 23 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sherrif of lancashire. Morì nel 1372, nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert DeSouthworthが1300年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアソウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Southworthは30歳，母Cecily D'Ewyasは35歳であった。1339年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーでAlice d'Ewyasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。1323年，23歳の時，職業はhigh sherrif of lancashireと記録されている。彼は1372年にイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert DeSouthworth(이)가 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 소우스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Southworth(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily D'Ewyas(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 Alice d'Ewyas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1323년, 23세의 나이로 그의 직업은 high sherrif of lancashire이었다. 그는 1372년 영국 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert DeSouthworth nasceu em 1300, em Southworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert de Southworth, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Cecily D'Ewyas, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice d'Ewyas em 1339, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Em 1323, com 23 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sherrif of lancashire. Ele faleceu em 1372, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert DeSouthworth родился в 1300 г. в местности соутворт, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Southworth было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily D'Ewyas, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice d'Ewyas в 1339 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1323 году, в возрасте 23 лет,  он работал по профессии high sherrif of lancashire. Он умер в 1372 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert DeSouthworth nació en 1300, en Southworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilbert de Southworth, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Cecily D'Ewyas, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Alice d'Ewyas en 1339, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. En 1323, a la edad de 23 años, su ocupación registrada era high sherrif of lancashire. Murió en 1372, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
